output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?countyLabel WHERE {
  ?city rdfs:label "Wake Forest" @en .
  ?city wdt:P17 wd:Q30 .
  ?city wdt:P131 ?county .
  ?county rdfs:label ?countyLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countyLabel) = "en")
}
output.result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| countyLabel           |
| --------------------- |
| Wake County (lang:en) |

{"name": "answer", "arguments": {"kg": "wikidata", "sparql": "PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>\nPREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>\nPREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>\n\nSELECT ?countyLabel WHERE {\n  ?city rdfs:label \"Wake Forest\"@en .\n  ?city wdt:P17 wd:Q30 .\n  ?city wdt:P131 ?county .\n  ?county rdfs:label ?countyLabel .\n  FILTER (LANG(?countyLabel) = \"en\")\n}", "answer": "Wake Forest is located in Wake County, North Carolina."}}

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?countyLabel WHERE {
  ?city rdfs:label "Wake Forest" @en .
  ?city wdt:P17 wd:Q30 .
  ?city wdt:P131 ?county .
  ?county rdfs:label ?countyLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countyLabel) = "en")
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| countyLabel           |
| --------------------- |
| Wake County (lang:en) |
